news.t: Frontier Asset Management Selects SEI to Launch Active ETFs

overview.description: The Frontier Asset Absolute Return ETF (FARX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund seeks to achieve long-term total return through an actively managed fund-of-funds that utilizes an absolute return approach. The portfolio generally holds 6 to 20 underlying ETFs across multiple asset classes. FARX was launched on Dec 19, 2024 and is issued by Frontier.
